title: Unknown Input, Zod 4 Validation, Domain Types, and Output Contracts · Compiler Case: Normalization Authorization Order
summary: The service casts req.body, accepts unknown keys, transforms before authorization, returns internal objects directly, and treats TypeScript inference as runtime proof. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts normalization authorization order increment in runtime schema and trusted domain boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Order decoding, validation, canonicalization, authorization, and effect so normalization cannot change the resource or policy target after checks.
Use Zod 4 strict objects, safeParse, issue paths, bounds, unions, refinements, and error mapping without accepting undeclared properties.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
